CustomField.description: Expression evaluated at runtime for "Calculation" question types. Reference other questions on the same form by Id with {{Id}}. Supports + - * / % (mod), parentheses, and the SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX/COUNT/IF functions. Example: ROUND({{a0K...}} * {{a0K...}}, 2). Errors (missing references, divide-by-zero) render as blank.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Expression for Calculation-type questions. Reference other answers via {{questionId}}. Supports +-*/%, parens, SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX/COUNT/IF/ROUND.
CustomField.label: Calculation Formula
